title: obione lasiantha
intro: Obione lasiantha, also known as beach evening primrose, is a coastal plant species belonging to the Primulaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Obione lasiantha include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Obione lasiantha can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water or using its extracts in ointments and creams, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
